basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has released the official Assistant Professor Notification 2026 on 14 May 2026 at the official website of CUSAT. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with MBA qualification in relevant specialisations along with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D qualification can apply online from 14-05-2026 to 15-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: MBA with Specialisation in Marketing / Finance / Operations / HR/Quantitative Techniques / Systems with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever the grading system is followed) from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC, CSIR or similar test accredited by the UGC like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph.D Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. The Ph.D degree of the candidate has been awarded in a regular mode. The Ph.D thesis has been evaluated by at least two external examiners. An open Ph.D viva voce of the candidate has been conducted. The candidate has published two research papers from his/her Ph.D work, out of which at least one is in a refereed journal. The candidate has presented at least two papers based on his/her Ph.D work in conference/seminars sponsored/funded/supported by the UGC/ICSSR/CSIR or any similar agency. The fulfillment of these conditions is to be certified by the Registrar or Dean (Academic Affairs) of the University concerned. OR The Ph.D degree has been obtained from a foreign University/Institution with a ranking among top 500 in the world University Ranking (at any time) by any one of the following: i. Quacquarelli Symonds (QS) ii. the Times Higher Education (THE) or The Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU) of the Shanghai Jiao Tong University (Shanghai).

salary_details.details: For Ph.D holder - ₹ 42,000/- per month For rest of the contract teachers - ₹40,000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) recruitment is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor at CUSAT?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the post of Assistant Professor (on Contract basis) at Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MBA with a specialization in Marketing, Finance, Operations, HR, Quantitative Techniques, or Systems with 55% marks, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, with a higher amount for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official CUSAT website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the CUSAT Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 950 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 195 for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the CUSAT Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is Ad.D3/17616/2011 Vol.II dated 14.05.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is CUSAT located?
faq.answer: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) is located in Kochi, Kerala, with the pincode 682022.
